# Compiled files
*.o
*.out
*.exe
*.a
*.so
*.dll

# Executables
program
a.out
your_program_name

# Editor files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
Thumbs.db
ehthumbs.db

# Debug files
*.dSYM/
*.log

# Temporary files
*.tmp
*.temp
*.cache
